chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1068 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.10.2024 Mr. Shahnawaz Bughio advocate along with applicant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur APG. ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI, J.- Through this application, applicant seeks pre- arrest bail in Crime No.06/2024 registered at P.S. Jhalo U/s 452, 354-A, 504, 114, 506, 147, 148, 337-A(i), 337-F(vi) PPC after his bail was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II Dadu vide order dated 25.05.2024. 2. The contents of FIR need not to be reproduced as the same are already mentioned in the memo of bail application. 3. The main contention of learned counsel for the applicant is that having similar role against accused Nabi Bux, the trial court has granted him pre-arrest bail and claims the same treatment as of accused Nabi Bux on the rule of consistency. 4. After going through the order dated 11.05.2024 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-II Dadu, APG has conceded for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail. 5. Heard learned counsel for the applicant, APG and perused the material available on record with their able assistance. From perusal of record, it reflects that role against applicant and co-accused Nabi Bux is similar wherein Nabi Bux has been granted bail by the trial court. 6. Under such circumstances, by giving the benefit of rule of consistency the bail application is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 25.09.2024 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Ali Haider
